t_ch: 你们快去吧。没什么事比陪伴家人和朋友更要紧了！
t_en: Go on now! Nothing's more important than spending time with family and friends!

t_ch: 稍等…其实我亲眼见识过，虎克的银河战力党*非常强*，你们要多加小心呀！
t_en: Wait... One more thing, I've seen Hook playing Cosmicon Collective. She is really strong, so you'd better be careful!

t_ch: 哼哼，这样的话，也许我很快就能见识到{NICKNAME}的「玄玄妙手」了。
t_en: Heh heh, in that case, maybe I'll finally get to witness {NICKNAME}'s Hand of Mystique pretty soon.

t_ch: 接下来，应该就要直面「魔古拉帮」的二当家了。这大概会是一场苦战，你需要再准备一下吗？
t_en: Next up, we'll be facing the Underboss of the Mogura Gang. This will be a tough fight. Do you need more time to get ready?

t_ch: 请你给他们下战书吧。
t_en: Send them a challenge letter.

t_ch: 哼，我真是欣赏你自信的样子。
t_en: Hmph, I must say I admire your confidence.

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 我是「魔古拉帮」的二当家「千面尤利安」，也是你们见到虎克老大的最后一道关隘。只可惜…你们的旅程到此为止了。
t_en: I am Julian of a Thousand Faces, the Underboss of the Mogura Gang, and the final obstacle between you and Boss Hook. Unfortunately... your journey ends here.

t_ch: 直接开始吧，我赶时间。
t_en: Let's get straight to it. I'm in a hurry.

t_ch: 小屁孩闭嘴，直接打牌。
t_en: Shut it, kid. Let's just play cards.

t_ch: 小兄弟，你有十秒钟…让开，或者滚蛋。
t_en: Listen up, buddy. You've got <unbreak>10</unbreak> seconds... Move aside, or get lost.

t_ch: 我、我…来到这里，酝酿了一肚子发狠的话，求求你们让我说完吧……
t_en: I—I came here with a belly full of harsh words. Please, just let me finish what I have to say...

t_ch: 你要是赢了，想说多久说多久。
t_en: If you win, you can talk as much as you want.

t_ch: 行胜于言，是你要学的第一课。
t_en: Actions speak louder than words. That's lesson number one for you.

t_ch: 好吧，有道理…我们这就开始，看招吧！
t_en: Alright, fair enough... Let's get started. Bring it on!

t_ch: 漆黑的虎克大人…对不起…尤利安辜负了你，没能拦住他们……
t_en: Pitch-Dark Hook the Great... I'm sorry... I have failed you. I couldn't stop them...

t_ch: 呃啊…我死了……
t_en: Ugh... I'm dead...

t_ch: 死得很安详。我们去向虎克下战书吧。
t_en: Rest in peace. Let's go challenge Hook now.

t_ch: <size=28>就算——</size>
t_en: <size=28>Even if—</size>

t_ch: 就算你们打败了我…也绝对不可能打败…漆黑的虎克大人……
t_en: Even if you defeated me... you'll never... defeat Pitch-Dark Hook the Great...

t_ch: 小兄弟，你诈尸了。
t_en: Hey buddy, back from the dead I see.

t_ch: 我是在*装死*！请不要打扰我。
t_en: I'm playing dead! Please don't disturb me.

t_ch: 抱歉呐，小兄弟，我是个侦探。唯一擅长的事，就是将无人知晓的真相说出来。
t_en: Sorry, buddy, I'm a detective. The only thing I'm good at is bringing hidden truths to light.

t_ch: 大家早就知道了。
t_en: Everyone already knows.

t_ch: 接下来就是你们与漆黑的虎克大人的大决战了，我在这里渲染一下悲壮的气氛……
t_en: And now comes your epic final battle with Pitch-Dark Hook the Great. Let me set the mood for this dramatic moment...

t_ch: 呃啊…我死了…你们去吧……
t_en: Ugh... I'm dead... go on without me...

t_ch: 呵呵，小朋友还蛮可爱的。记得早点回住处去，别一直躺在地上，小心感冒哦。
t_en: Hehe, what a cute kid. Remember to go home soon, don't just lie around on the ground, or you'll catch a cold.

t_ch: 去吧，和虎克决一死战，使出我期待已久的「玄玄妙手」吧！
t_en: Go now, face Hook in your final battle! Show me The Hand of Mystique that I've been waiting so long to see!

t_ch: 终于到这一刻了…{NICKNAME}，你准备好面对与虎克的最终决战了吗？
t_en: The moment has finally come... {NICKNAME}, are you ready for your final showdown with Hook?

t_ch: 请你给他们下战书吧。
t_en: Send them a challenge letter.

t_ch: 呵呵，看来我终于有机会见证你的「玄玄妙手」了。
t_en: Heh, looks like I'll finally get to witness The Hand of Mystique in action.

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 哼，接连战胜了「梆梆•克拉拉」、「音律琴魔•希露瓦」…你们就这么想阻止我吗？
t_en: Hmph, first Help-Me Clara, then Melodic Demon Serval... Are you all that desperate to stop me?

t_ch: 我不想阻止你，我想看你和{NICKNAME}打牌。
t_en: I don't want to stop you. I want to watch you play cards with {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 先声明，我对打牌不感兴趣——我答应过「青春岁月」，必须在更多悲剧上演前阻止你。
t_en: Let me make this clear: I have no interest in card games. I made a promise to Golden Youth to stop you before more tragedies unfold.

t_ch: 算了吧，我对你们的目的不感兴趣。荣誉队员，我只在乎你…你，会阻止我吗？
t_en: Forget it. I'm not interested in your goals. Honorary member, I only care about you... will you stop me?

t_ch: 本地的帮派是无辜的，虎克。
t_en: The local gangs are innocent, Hook.

t_ch: 无辜？在银河战力党的世界里，胜者即是正义！
t_en: Innocent? In the world of Cosmicon Collective, justice can only be found in victory!

t_ch: 抱歉虎克，今天我是冷硬派。
t_en: Sorry Hook, I'm playing hard-boiled today.

t_ch: 冷硬派？哼，我还是苹果派呢！不要在那里拽虎克听不懂的词语。
t_en: Hard-boiled? Hmph, then I'm playing harder-boiled! Stop using words that Hook doesn't understand.

t_ch: 阻止你？我是来跟你打牌的…
t_en: Stop you? I'm just here to play cards with you...

t_ch: 你以为虎克还是个天真的小孩吗？时代变了，荣誉队员！
t_en: You think Hook is still a naive little kid? Times have changed, honorary member!

t_ch: 虎克跟随布洛妮娅大人来到这里之后，第一次接触到了银河战力党。那时，就有*好心人*告诉虎克「嘿，银河战力党是个好东西」。
t_en: After I came here with Lady Bronya, I got to play Cosmicon Collective for the first time. Back then, some kind soul told me, "Hey, Cosmicon Collective is some good stuff."

t_ch: 虎克只是想用好东西去做点好事而已。
t_en: Hook just wants to do good things with good stuff, that's all.

t_ch: 多么可悲啊，虎克最喜欢的荣誉队员今天却要阻止我。
t_en: How tragic... Hook's favorite honorary member is now standing in her way.

t_ch: 沸水煮过的鸡蛋会变硬，这就是{RUBY_B#冷硬派}「Hard-Boiled」{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: Boiled eggs get hard. That's why they're called "Hard-Boiled."

t_ch: 经历社会熬炼的人也会变硬，为了目的而变得冷酷无情、不择手段，这就是你，虎克！
t_en: People who've been through life's grinder also grow hard. They become cold, ruthless, and willing to do whatever it takes. That's what you've become, Hook!

t_ch: …求求你，别再把冷硬派台词往小孩儿身上套了。
t_en: ...Please, stop forcing hard-boiled detective monologues on kids.

t_ch: 可惜，就算是荣誉队员，也完全不可能胜过漆黑的虎克大人，哇咔咔！
t_en: Too bad, even the honorary member doesn't stand a chance against Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! Wahahaha!

t_ch: 有意思，让我来算一下……
t_en: Interesting, let me calculate this...

t_ch: …艮上兑下。「君子以征忿窒欲」，原来如此。
t_en: ...Mountain above, marsh below. "The noble one curbs anger and reins in desire." So that's what it means.

t_ch: 你算出什么来了？
t_en: What does your divination say?

t_ch: 无妨，你安心和她对决就好了。
t_en: Don't worry about it, just focus on your match with her.

t_ch: 怎么一言不合就起卦？
t_en: Why are you performing divination out of nowhere?

t_ch: 别在意，职业病犯了。
t_en: Don't mind me, just a force of habit.

t_ch: 作为鼹鼠党的老大，虎克接受你的挑战。荣誉队员，让我们开始最后的决战吧！
t_en: As the boss of The Moles, Hook accepts your challenge. Honorary member, let's begin our final battle!

t_ch: 这{NICKNAME}要是能翻盘，别说叫「玄玄妙手」了…叫「玄玄玄玄玄手」都没问题。
t_en: If {NICKNAME} could turn this around, forget this Hand of Mystique... we might as well call it the Thousand Hands of Mystique!

t_ch: 哇咔咔，怎么了，荣誉队员～
t_en: Wah-ha-ha! What's wrong, honorary member~

t_ch: 虎克，现在的你，很卑鄙！
t_en: Hook, you're being very despicable right now!

t_ch: 有些人会称这种彻底毁灭游戏的做法为卑鄙，虎克将其称为高效。
t_en: Some people might call this game-destroying strategy despicable, but Hook calls it efficient.

t_ch: 我怎么没有这么超模的牌呢？
t_en: Why don't I ever draw such broken cards?

t_ch: 正常来说，你不应该问她为什么会有这张牌吗？
t_en: Shouldn't you ask her why she has this card in the first place?

t_ch: 虎克才没有作弊哦！虎克使用的卡牌，可是银河战力党官方出品的卡牌，完全合乎规则～
t_en: Hook didn't cheat! Hook's cards are officially licensed by the Cosmicon Collective, totally within the rules~

t_ch: 可恶，我们就要止步于此了吗？
t_en: Darn it, is this where it ends for us?

t_ch: 哎呀呀～没想到，到底是我最先使出了颠覆整个局面的「玄玄妙手」。
t_en: Oh my, oh my~ Who would've thought that I'd be the one to pull off the Hand of Mystique and turn this whole situation around?

t_ch: 老巫…娜塔莎姐姐！你怎么来了！
t_en: Old wi— Big Sis Natasha! What are you doing here!

t_ch: 刚才有人联系我，说有个叫虎克的小朋友，用作弊的手段，在「银河战力党」的玩家圈子里面兴风作浪……
t_en: I just got word that a child named Hook has been causing trouble in the Cosmicon Collective player community by using cheats...

t_ch: 虎克，你要有什么想解释的吗?
t_en: Hook, is there anything you'd like to explain?

t_ch: 原来「玄玄妙手」就是请家长！
t_en: So the Hand of Mystique was to call the enemy's parent!

t_ch: 兵无常形。在不同的战局中，所谓「玄玄妙手」也会呈现出不同的形态。
t_en: War takes many forms. In different battle situations, what we call the Hand of Mystique can manifest in various ways.

t_ch: 荣誉队员，现在的你…啊不，你一直都很卑鄙！
t_en: Honorary member, you're being very... No wait, you've always been despicable!

t_ch: 可是…虎克没有作弊！那只是*好心人*送给我的「必胜卡」！是银河战力党的官方卡牌！
t_en: But... Hook didn't cheat! It was just a "Victory Card" given to me by a kind person! It's an official card from the Cosmicon Collective!

t_ch: 那你用这张卡，别人有可能赢过你吗？
t_en: With this card, is there any chance someone could beat you?

t_ch: …不可能赢过我的，因为这是「必胜卡」。
t_en: ...No, because this is my "Victory Card"!

t_ch: 如果别人根本没机会赢过你，那这还称得上是一场公平的比赛吗？
t_en: If others don't have a chance to win against you, could you really call this a fair game?

t_ch: 无论它是不是「官方卡牌」，如果它让比赛失去了公平性，那么这就叫做「作弊」。
t_en: Whether it's an "official card" or not, if it compromises the fairness of the match, that's what we call "cheating".

t_ch: 虎克明白了…对不起，我不想作弊了，我想要堂堂正正的对决。
t_en: Hook understands now... Sorry, I don't wanna cheat anymore. I want a fair and square battle!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，虽然虎克已经给你添了不少麻烦，但这小小的教训，还得麻烦你——
t_en: {NICKNAME}, though Hook has already caused you enough trouble, I must trouble you for this small lesson...

t_ch: 漆黑的虎克大人，换一张公平的卡牌，再和{NICKNAME}堂堂正正地打一场吧。
t_en: Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, switch that card with a fair one, and face {NICKNAME} in a proper match.

t_ch: 让我看看你真正的实力。
t_en: Show me what you're really made of.

t_ch: 虎克，准备好一场惨败吧。
t_en: Hook, prepare yourself for a crushing defeat.

t_ch: 来吧！就算用常规的卡牌对战，虎克也是不会输的！
t_en: Come on! Even with normal cards, Hook won't lose!

t_ch: 虎克输了……
t_en: Hook lost...

t_ch: 鼹鼠党的远征就到此为止了吗？
t_en: Is this where The Moles' expedition ends?

t_ch: 看来事情告一段落了。之后我会带着虎克，去给所有她添过麻烦的人当面道歉。
t_en: Looks like things have finally settled down. After, I'll take Hook to personally apologize to everyone she's caused trouble for.

t_ch: 呜呜呜…娜塔莎姐姐，虎克早就知道错了——
t_en: *sob*... Big Sis Natasha, I already know that I'm wrong...

t_ch: 其实…其实虎克一直是个善良懂事的好孩子…都是被坏家伙带上了不归路……
t_en: Actually... Hook has always been a good and sensible kid... It's those bad guys who led me down the wrong path...

t_ch: 虎克…你又动什么坏心思了？
t_en: Hook... what are you scheming now?

t_ch: 虎克被别人贴上了所谓「小屁孩」的标签。
t_en: Hook has been labeled by others as a "little brat."

t_ch: 打牌的时候我下手很重，不少本地帮派也因此分崩离析。旅馆的饭菜不值那个价格，虎克就敢吃霸王餐，这种事也经常发生……
t_en: I go all out when I play cards, and quite a few local gangs fell apart because of me. And when the food at inns isn't worth the price, Hook just dines and dashes. That kind of thing happens all the time...

t_ch: 但是！即使是这样的虎克，也能分辨出那些真正的「邪恶」！
t_en: But! Even someone like Hook can tell what's truly evil!

t_ch: 所谓的「邪恶」，就是将虎克这样人见人爱的小孩子带上不归路的坏家伙！
t_en: "Evil" is what you call those bad guys who lead adorable kids like Hook down the wrong path!

t_ch: 荣誉队员，那样的坏家伙…就必须由你来制裁！
t_en: Honorary member, bad guys like that... must be punished by you!

t_ch: 虎克，你要做污点证人！
t_en: Hook, you need to be a prosecution witness!

t_ch: 告诉我们，那个人是谁？
t_en: Tell us, who is that person?

t_ch: 哪有什么坏家伙，准是这孩子胡编的，我先把她带回旅馆去吧——回去之后再给我仔细讲讲你经常吃霸王餐的故事。
t_en: There's no bad guy here, she must be making things up. I'll take her back to the hotel, and then you can tell me all about your dine-and-dash stories in detail.

t_ch: …你要去找那个人，去找「四、大、天、王——」！
t_en: ...You need to find that person, find "the Formidable Four!"

t_ch: 就这样，虎克又哭又闹地被娜塔莎拖走了。
t_en: And with that, Hook was dragged away by Natasha, kicking and screaming.

t_ch: 虽然没能见证到牌桌上的「玄玄妙手」，但好歹，我自己使出了牌桌外的「玄玄妙手」。
t_en: Even though I didn't get to witness the Hand of Mystique at the card table, at least I managed to pull off my own Hand of Mystique outside of it.

t_ch: 所以在忍受了一千七百年的煎熬之后，我的执念得以化解…终于可以…归于空寂了…吗？
t_en: After <unbreak>1,700</unbreak> years of torment, my obsession can finally be laid to rest... At last... And I can fade into nothingness... right?

t_ch: 这破设定你还没忘呢？
t_en: You still remember that ridiculous setting?

t_ch: 我每天都做健脑操，记性好着呢！
t_en: I do brain exercises every day, my memory's sharp as ever!

t_ch: 怎么还是一个疑问句呢？
t_en: Why is it a question then?

t_ch: 我的意思是说，感觉事情还没有真正结束。
t_en: What I mean to say is, it feels like things aren't really over yet.

t_ch: 我有预感…我还会有机会在牌桌上见到你的「玄玄妙手」，所以我还是留下来吧。
t_en: I've got a feeling... I'll get another chance to witness your Hand of Mystique at the card table, so I think I'll stick around.

t_ch: 魔古拉帮覆灭了，牌佬汇迟早会东山再起…可是这座城市却还有着肮脏的污点。
t_en: The Mogura Gang is finished, and the Cardway will rise again sooner or later... but this city's still stained with filth.

t_ch: 你听到虎克最后的悲鸣了吗？我很熟悉那样的声音——唯有被诓骗而被迫踏上无间之道的无辜者，才会发出那样的悲鸣。
t_en: Did you hear Hook's final wail? I know that sounds all too well. Only an innocent soul, deceived and driven onto the path of retaliation, makes such a cry.

t_ch: 因此我接下了那孩子的委托——找到隐藏在<color=#dbc291ff>四大天王</color>中的那位，教坏了她的恶徒。
t_en: So I took on the kid's request to track down that villain hiding among <color=#dbc291ff>the Formidable Four</color> who led her astray.

t_ch: 作为侦探，我不会让真正的恶徒逍遥法外。如果你有心相助，就到「青春岁月」这里吧。让我们聚在一起好好商量一下对策。
t_en: As a detective, I won't let the true culprit walk free. If you're willing to help, come to Golden Youth. We'll sit down and figure out a plan.

t_ch: 感谢各位几日的辛劳，赶走了「魔古拉帮」，我「青春岁月」感激涕零！
t_en: Thank you all for your hard work these past few days. With the Mogura Gang driven out, I, Golden Youth, am truly moved to tears!

t_ch: 我本想立刻当牛做马答谢，可惜…重建牌佬汇要紧，您就当我没做过承诺吧！
t_en: I would've worked my fingers to the bone to repay you right away, but alas... I must hurry to rebuild the Cardway, so just pretend I didn't make a promise!

t_ch: 不过我找到一些「四大天王」的消息，已经都交给不死途大哥了，希望能帮上忙！
t_en: But I did dig up some info about "the Formidable Four" and passed it all to Brother Ashveil, hope it comes in handy!

t_ch: 多亏了「青春岁月」，我已经掌握了三位「天王」的身份——他们其中任何一人都很有可能是教唆虎克的幕后黑手。
t_en: Thanks to Golden Youth, I've identified three of the Formidable Four. Any one of them could be the mastermind behind Hook's manipulation.

t_ch: 「四大天王」怎么就找到三个，通常来说不应该有五个吗？
t_en: How come we only found three of the Formidable Four? Shouldn't there usually be five of them?

t_ch: 再说了，也有可能四个人合伙把虎克给教坏了嘛……
t_en: Besides, it's possible that all four of them worked together to lead Hook astray...

t_ch: 那得多坏啊！
t_en: That's messed up!

t_ch: 只能去当面问个清楚了。
t_en: I'll have to ask them face to face.

t_ch: …虎克无师自通的可能性呢？
t_en: ...What if Hook picked it up all on her own?

t_ch: 作为侦探故事的结尾，那也挺糟糕的。
t_en: That's a pretty lousy ending for a detective story.

t_ch: …既然我们接下了委托，接下来能做的只有调查、走访，以及寻找真相而已。
t_en: ...Now that we're on the case, all that's left is to investigate, gather intel, and uncover the truth.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们要调查清楚，究竟是哪位「天王」教坏了那样纯真的小孩子。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, we need to get to the bottom of this and find out which member of "the Formidable Four" misguided such an innocent child.

t_ch: 我倒要看看谁这么坏！
t_en: I've gotta see who's evil enough to do this!

t_ch: 出发吧，又是一个与谎言约会的好日子。
t_en: Let's go, another fine day for a date with lies.

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 该调查四大天王了。
t_en: Time to investigate the Formidable Four.

t_ch: 嗯嗯！必须我们要查清楚，究竟是哪位「天王」教坏了那样纯真的小孩子！这也太对不起青春了！
t_en: Mm-hmm! We have to get to the bottom of this and find out which of the Formidable Four led such an innocent child astray! This is completely unethical!

t_ch: 如果我的调查准确，你应该就是银河战力党的「四大天王」之一。
t_en: If my investigation is correct, you must be one of the Formidable Four of the Cosmicon Collective.

t_ch: 对吧？火花小姐。
t_en: Aren't you, Miss Sparxie?

t_ch: 哎呀，真是的…明明我每次和人打牌的时候都会切小号讲垃圾话，怎么还是被你给翻出来了？果然我还是最讨厌侦探了！
t_en: Ugh, seriously... I always switch to my alt account to trash talk when playing cards with people, so how did you still manage to find me? I really do hate detectives the most!

t_ch: 为什么要帮助魔古拉帮？
t_en: Why help the Mogura Gang?

t_ch: 那还用说，当然是因为好玩了！
t_en: Well duh, because it's fun of course!

t_ch: 帮一个小孩把一群大人打得溃不成军，多有意思啊～
t_en: Helping a kid wreck a bunch of adults, now that's what I call interesting~

t_ch: 是不是你教坏了虎克？
t_en: Did you teach Hook bad habits?

t_ch: 严正声明！火花直播间是全年龄向的，绝对不存在教坏小朋友的问题！
t_en: Official statement! Sparxie's livestream is family-friendly and absolutely won't teach any children anything bad!

t_ch: 我甚至还禁止未成年人刷礼物呢！
t_en: I even banned minors from sending super chats!

t_ch: 不会让你们白跑一趟的——因为我刚好知道一些「必胜卡」的线索。
t_en: Don't worry, your trip won't be for nothing, because I happen to know some clues about the "Victory Card."

t_ch: 不过嘛，得用银河战力党战胜我，我才会告诉你们～
t_en: But hey, you'll have to beat me in a game of Cosmicon Collective first, and then I'll tell you~

t_ch: 既然你被称为「天王」，想必银河战力党水平相当了得？
t_en: Since they call you "formidable," I bet you have top-tier skills in Cosmicon Collective?

t_ch: 这么说吧，平时多看看我的直播——我保证你，人在家中躺，牌技心中涨。
t_en: Let me put it this way: Just tune in to my livestreams. I guarantee you'll level up your skills by just chilling at home.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，打牌吧！
t_en: Hey {NICKNAME}, let's play cards!

t_ch: 有必要搞得这么复杂吗？
t_en: Does it really have to be this complicated?

t_ch: 这不叫「复杂」，这叫「节目效果」！
t_en: This isn't "complicated," this is called "entertainment"!

t_ch: 有没有替代方案？咱打一架？
t_en: Got any alternatives? How about a real fight?

t_ch: 我才不要和你打架呢！你打人可疼了！
t_en: No way I'm fighting with you! Your hits hurt like hell!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，我倒是要看看，能打败虎克的人，究竟是什么水平。
t_en: Heh heh, I'd like to see just how good someone who could beat Hook really is.

t_ch: 真不愧是你啊，小灰毛。我可好久没在银河战力党对决中体验过心跳加速的感觉了呢！
t_en: As expected from you, Gray Hair! It's been ages since I felt my heart racing in a Cosmicon Collective match!

t_ch: 虎克曾经提到有人将「必胜卡」送给了她，你对这人有印象吗？
t_en: Hook mentioned someone gave her a "Victory Card." Got any impression of who that could be?

t_ch: 可有印象了！还都是好印象——
t_en: And what an impression it was! All good ones too...

t_ch: 因为那张「必胜卡」是我送给虎克的。
t_en: Because that "Victory Card" came from me.

t_ch: 竟然是你！
t_en: So it was you!?

t_ch: 也用不着这么惊讶吧！
t_en: No need to be so shocked!

t_ch: 果然是你！
t_en: I knew it was you!

t_ch: 嘿嘿～你不会是我的铁粉吧？
t_en: Hehe~ Don't tell me you're my loyal fan?

t_ch: 果然是你教坏了虎克？
t_en: So it was you who led Hook astray?

t_ch: 冤枉呀！我绝对没有教坏小孩子！
t_en: I'm innocent! I swear! I definitely didn't teach any kids anything bad!

t_ch: 我送给她那张「必胜卡」的时候还专门和她说过，这张卡只能在娱乐局中做节目效果，不可以拿来与人对决。
t_en: When I gave her that "Victory Card," I specifically told her it was just for show in entertainment matches, not to be used in actual duels.

t_ch: 咱们直播间主打的就是一个三观正，绝不开挂，教坏她的另有其人！
t_en: My stream's all about fair play and good vibes, no cheating whatsoever! If someone's teaching her bad habits, it surely wasn't me!

t_ch: 想要隐瞒就没必要说自己给了虎克「必胜卡」，这确实不像说谎。
t_en: If she wanted to hide it, there'd be no reason for her to mention giving Hook the "Victory Card" in the first place. Doesn't seem like she's lying.

t_ch: …感谢你的线索，火花小姐。至少帮我们…排除掉了一些错误答案。
t_en: ...Thanks for the clue, Miss Sparxie. At least it helped us rule out some wrong answers...

t_ch: 别客气！这都是我应该做哒～
t_en: Don't mention it! It's the least I could do~

t_ch: 去找下一位天王问问看吧。这位天王跟我还挺熟的，已经事前联络过她了。
t_en: Let's go ask the next of the Formidable Four. I know her well, and I've already contacted her in advance.

t_ch: 你准备好了吗？我们随时可以出发。
t_en: Are you ready? We can head out anytime.

t_ch: 出发吧！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 走吧…希望那家伙这次能稍微好沟通一点。
t_en: Let's go... I hope this person will be a bit easier to deal with this time.

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 哎，我也真是没想到，连你也混成了「四大天王」，真是邪门。
t_en: *sigh* I never thought that even you would end up as one of "the Formidable Four". That's just wild.

t_ch: 掘地•忍侠虽然走上了作弊的歧途，但即使不作弊。她的「银河战力党」才能也是世所罕见，值得在下指教一番。
t_en: Although Ninja Digger has strayed down the path of cheating, even without that, her Cosmicon Collective talent is truly rare and worthy of my guidance!

t_ch: 是不是你教坏了虎克？
t_en: Did you teach Hook bad habits?

t_ch: 在下只是教会了掘地•忍侠一些进阶的技巧，其中并不包括作弊技巧。
t_en: I merely taught Ninja Digger some advanced techniques, none of which involved cheating.

t_ch: 至于是谁教坏了掘地•忍侠，在下的确知道一些线索，那……
t_en: As for who misguided Ninja Digger, I do have some leads about that, it—

t_ch: 天王，能否先打完一把银河战力党之后再讲线索？
t_en: Miss Formidable, mind playing a round of Cosmicon Collective before we discuss the clues?

t_ch: 当然，在下十分熟悉本地的忍斗规矩。
t_en: Of course, I am well versed in the local ninja combat rules.

t_ch: 我…你…我…哎哟，嗐…！
t_en: I... you... I... ugh, come on...!

t_ch: 请让在下与诸君进行一场银河战力党对决，让我确证各位探求真相的意志吧！
t_en: Allow me to challenge you all to a duel of Cosmicon Collective. Let me test your resolve in seeking the truth!

t_ch: 怎么又要玩骰子！
t_en: Not the dice again!

t_ch: 人心会掩饰、会撒谎、会回避，而骰子不会。因此，骰子是人心的明镜。
t_en: Humans can hide, lie, and evade, but dice never do. That's why dice are the true mirror of the human heart.

t_ch: 正合我意！
t_en: That's exactly what I wanted!

t_ch: 球棒•忍侠，这场对决，在下期待已久了。
t_en: Ninja Baseballer, I've been looking forward to this duel for a long time.

t_ch: 真不愧是文武兼备的球棒•忍侠！在下见证了你纯净无杂的意志，输得心服口服！
t_en: As expected of the Ninja Baseballer, master of both brain and brawn! I bow before your pure and unwavering resolve, and I'll accept and admit this defeat!

t_ch: 嘤嘤嘤，还是没看到「玄玄妙手」，我果然还是带着怨念升天吧……
t_en: *sniff sniff* Still didn't get to see the Hand of Mystique... Guess I'll just ascend to heaven with this regret...

t_ch: 别管这股只想着打牌的怨念了，乱破，我需要线索。
t_en: Forget about this obsession with card games. Rappa, I need some leads.

t_ch: 白兔•忍侠曾向你们隐瞒了一个关键信息。
t_en: Ninja White Rabbit has been hiding a key piece of information from you.

t_ch: 那张「必胜卡」的确是官方发行的，而官方运营恰恰就是「四大天王」——寒腿•愚忍！
t_en: That "Victory Card" was indeed an official release, and the operator happens to be one of the Formidable Four: Coldfeet Fool Ninja!

t_ch: …这又是谁啊？你们忍侠有点太多了。
t_en: ...Who's this now? You Ninjas are multiplying faster than I can keep track.

t_ch: 寒腿•愚忍，应该是指银河战力党的运营负责人，假面愚者，桑博。
t_en: Coldfeet Fool Ninja must be Sampo, the operations manager of the Cosmicon Collective, a Masked Fool.

t_ch: 果然是桑博做的好事！
t_en: Of course it was Sampo's doing!

t_ch: 只是有嫌疑罢了。
t_en: It's just a suspicion for now.

t_ch: 桑博不会教坏小孩子的。
t_en: Sampo won't be a bad influence on kids.

t_ch: 我也有相似的考虑。
t_en: I had similar thoughts.

t_ch: 原来这游戏是桑博运营的。
t_en: So this game is operated by Sampo.

t_ch: 众所周知，银河战力党有三个开发者——斯蒂芬、乔瓦尼和桑博。
t_en: As everyone knows, the Cosmicon Collective has three developers: Stephen, Giovanni and Sampo.

t_ch: …桑博吗？彷徨了一千七百年，我还没见过这位「银河战力党」的运营负责人呢。玩家社区确实天天骂他…但他是会教坏小孩子的那种人吗？
t_en: ...Sampo? After wandering around for <unbreak>1,700</unbreak> years, I have yet to meet this operations manager of the "Cosmicon Collective." Sure, players trash-talk him every day on the forums... but is he really the type who'd be a bad influence on kids?

t_ch: 他确实算得上臭名远播，但唯独在「照顾小孩」这件事上，名声特别好。
t_en: He's infamous, that's for sure. But when it comes to looking after children, he's got quite the good reputation.

t_ch: 真相究竟如何，恐怕要等我们当面问问了。多谢了，乱破！
t_en: We'll have to ask him face-to-face to find out the truth. Thanks, Rappa!

t_ch: 哼，可惜啊！我恐怕没机会见到桑博了！一千七百年的彷徨，即将走向终局，我这一缕残魂…也即将…归于空寂……
t_en: Hmph, what a pity! I'm afraid I won't get the chance to meet Sampo! After <unbreak>1,700</unbreak> years of wandering, everything's coming to its finale, and this lingering fragment of my soul... will soon... fade into nothingness...

t_ch: 啊？怎么突然开始演这出戏？
t_en: Huh? What's with the sudden drama?

t_ch: 我要升天了。
t_en: I'm ascending to heaven.

t_ch: 那…祝您一路平安？
t_en: Uh... safe travels, I guess?

t_ch: 对了……
t_en: Oh, right...

t_ch: 嗯？
t_en: Hmm?

t_ch: 面具那件事，应该给你添了不少麻烦吧？实在抱歉。
t_en: Sorry about all the trouble with that mask. Must've been quite a hassle for you.

t_ch: 没事的，面具的事已经不重要了，别放在心上。
t_en: Don't worry about it, the mask thing doesn't matter anymore, just let it go.

t_ch: 还有你的那些朋友…请节哀顺变。
t_en: And as for those friends of yours... my deepest condolences.

t_ch: 别帮我操心，我自己会处理好该处理的一切。
t_en: Don't worry about me, I'll handle everything that needs to be handled.

t_ch: 嘁，怎么突然消失了？这是真升天了？
t_en: Tch, she vanished just like that? Did she ascend for real?

t_ch: …看来，只有我们俩去找寒腿•愚忍谈心了。怎么样，你准备好了吗？
t_en: ...Looks like it's down to just the two of us to have a heart-to-heart with Coldfeet Fool Ninja. So, are you ready?

t_ch: 出发吧！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 希望这家伙不要也缠着我们玩「银河战力党」。
t_en: I hope this guy doesn't bug us about playing Cosmicon Collective too.

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: 这地上是个，雪堆？
t_en: Is that a pile of snow on the ground?

t_ch: 看起来好眼熟，我是不是在哪里看到过？
t_en: Looks familiar... Have I seen this somewhere before?

t_ch: 我看看……
t_en: Let's see...

t_ch: 不对，这雪堆里面藏了个人！桑博被埋在这个雪堆里了！快救人！
t_en: Wait, there's someone inside the snow! Sampo is buried under it! Quick, we have to save him!

t_ch: 不，别担心，我没事。这并不是雪，而是灰烬。
t_en: No, don't worry, I'm fine. This isn't snow, it's ash.

t_ch: 灰烬？什么意思？
t_en: Ash? What do you mean?

t_ch: 意思就是，我已经燃烧殆尽了，只剩下雪白的灰。
t_en: It means I've burned myself out completely, all that remains is pure, white ash.

t_ch: 是我在你们到来之前，用银河战力党将他彻底击垮了。
t_en: I completely crushed him with in Cosmicon Collective before you all arrived.

t_ch: 爻…骰魂小姐？我还以为您老升天了……
t_en: Yao... I mean, Miss Dice Soul? I thought you'd already kicked the bucket...

t_ch: 我嘛，发现自己尘愿未了，还不能升天——话说你不是看不见我吗？
t_en: Well, I found I still had unfinished business and couldn't ascend just yet. Wait, I thought you couldn't see me?

t_ch: 我这是…刚觉醒的灵视能力。
t_en: This must be... my newly awakened Soulsight ability.

t_ch: 我费了那么大的劲，才把{NICKNAME}教育成万中无一的银河战力党奇才。如果到最后没能亲自和{F#她}{M#他}对决，那我这一千七百年的苦不都白受了？
t_en: I put in all that effort to train {NICKNAME} into a one-in-a-million Cosmicon Collective prodigy. If I don't get to face {F#her}{M#him} in a match after all this, wouldn't my <unbreak>1,700</unbreak> years of hard work be all for naught?

t_ch: 你一开始的目的就是这个吧？
t_en: This was your plan all along, wasn't it?

t_ch: 你好喜欢一千七百年的设定…
t_en: You really love the <unbreak>1700</unbreak>-year setting...

t_ch: 被你发现了。
t_en: Oh, you got me.

t_ch: 银河战力党是个好游戏，但配得上我的对手却寥寥无几。所以我就想着，要不找个好苗子来自己培育一下吧～
t_en: Cosmicon Collective is a great game, but there are very few players worthy of being my opponents. So I thought, why not find a promising rookie and train them myself~

t_ch: 桑博已经燃尽了，但是别担心，我早已经问到了第四大天王的身份。
t_en: Sampo has burned out, but don't worry, I've already squeezed out the identity of the last member of the Formidable Four.

t_ch: 太好了！
t_en: Nice!

t_ch: 只要你能赢过我，那我就会和盘托出。
t_en: Beat me, and I'll tell you everything.

t_ch: 我…你…我…哎哟，嗐…！
t_en: I... you... I... ugh, come on...!

t_ch: 放着让我来吧。
t_en: Leave it to me!

t_ch: 哼，手下败将。
t_en: Hmph. A defeated opponent.

t_ch: 培育了你这么久，我等的可就是这一刻。千万别让我失望哦。
t_en: I've been training you all this time for this very moment. Don't you dare disappoint me now.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈！畅快畅快，真是一场畅快的对决！果然，还是自己种的果子吃起来最甜啊！
t_en: HAHAHA! What a blast, what an absolutely thrilling duel! Nothing tastes sweeter than the fruits of your own labor!

t_ch: 超出常规思维和预测，大局观与想象力，扭转不利局面，一举锁定胜局…我心中的「玄玄妙手」并非在某一手胜着，也并非局限于银河战力党……
t_en: To think outside the box and beyond prediction, to see the bigger picture, to turn the tide and seize victory... the Hand of Mystique I seek isn't about any one decisive move, nor is it limited to just Cosmicon Collective...

t_ch: 我的预感没有错，只是见证你那「玄玄妙手」的牌桌不在这里，而在整个二相乐园。
t_en: My hunch was right, but the table that had witnessed the Hand of Mystique of yours isn't here. It's across all of Planarcadia.

t_ch: 敬请期待了。
t_en: I'm looking forward to it.

t_ch: 老谜语人了…
t_en: What a riddler...

t_ch: …那么，作为银河战力党的骰魂，我应该感到满足而升天了。再见～
t_en: ...Well then, as a Dice Soul of the Cosmicon Collective, I can die happy now. Bye~

t_ch: 等等！你先说完线索之后再升天。
t_en: Hold up! You're not going anywhere until you finish telling me about those clues.

t_ch: 哦，差点忘了。
t_en: Oh, I almost forgot.

t_ch: 「必胜卡」确实是桑博的。发行目的自然是为了宣发造势——他把卡牌给了火花。
t_en: The Victory Card was indeed Sampo's. Its purpose was to create buzz and publicity. He gave the card to Sparxie.

t_ch: 至于火花把卡牌给了虎克，则完全是他意料之外的情况。
t_en: As for Sparxie giving the card to Hook, that was completely unexpected.

t_ch: 他不是很在乎，毕竟「魔古拉帮大闹二相乐园」的宣传噱头也足够吸引人了。
t_en: He didn't care much, after all, "The Mogura Gang's Rampage in Planarcadia" was already a catchy enough headline to draw people in.

t_ch: 从结论上来讲，桑博水平还行，但绝不是什么幕后黑手。
t_en: Long story short, Sampo's competent enough, but he's definitely not the mastermind.

t_ch: 那么唆使虎克变坏的，果然是第四位「天王」……
t_en: So the one who led Hook astray was indeed the fourth of the "Formidable Four"...

t_ch: …答案是，贝洛伯格访问团的，希儿小姐。
t_en: ...The answer is Miss Seele from the Belobog delegation.

t_ch: 哎哟，这个希儿怎么这么坏啊！
t_en: Geez, why is Seele being such a meanie!

t_ch: 我听桑博说，她还是虎克最信任的人。
t_en: I heard from Sampo that she's Hook's most trusted person.

t_ch: …希儿知道自己是四大天王吗？
t_en: ...Does Seele know she's one of the Formidable Four?

t_ch: 哈哈，难说。
t_en: Haha, who knows.

t_ch: 看来，我们都想要真相，可惜…真相从来都不是我们所希望的样子。
t_en: Looks like we all want the truth, alas... the truth is never what we hope it to be.

t_ch: 走吧，让我们一起把这桩案件彻底终结了吧。
t_en: Come on, let's put this case to a close once and for all.

t_ch: 出发吧！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 呵，这条无间之道，终于也要走向结末了吗？
t_en: Heh, so this bloody path of retaliation is finally coming to an end.

t_ch: 我再准备一下。
t_en: I need a moment to get ready.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}？你怎么来了？你身后跟着的那两位又是干什么的？
t_en: {NICKNAME}? What are you doing here? And who're those two following you?

t_ch: 你就是希儿，那个教坏了虎克的人？
t_en: So you're Seele, the bad influence on Hook?

t_ch: 哈？！什么情况？
t_en: Huh!? What's that all about?

t_ch: 你们向希儿讲述了魔古拉帮事件的始末，希儿听得目瞪口呆。
t_en: You told Seele the whole story about the Mogura Gang incident, leaving her completely dumbfounded.

t_ch: 等等！让我先梳理一下：我确实在玩银河战力党，被列入「四大天王」姑且是当作对我实力的认可…但是，你说我教坏虎克？我这几天根本就没见着她！
t_en: Wait, let me get this straight: Sure, I play with the Cosmicon Collective, and being named one of "the Formidable Four" is kind of like recognition of my strength... but you're saying I'm a bad influence on Hook? I haven't even seen her in days!

t_ch: 希儿小姐是个一望而知的正派人。
t_en: Miss Seele is obviously a good person through and through.

t_ch: 没错。
t_en: Yeah.

t_ch: …有没有可能是你*离开贝洛伯格前*对虎克说过什么话，让一个纯真的小孩变坏了？
t_en: ...Is it possible that something you said to Hook before leaving Belobog corrupted an innocent child?

t_ch: 你看那孩子真是能靠*一句话*就变坏的吗？
t_en: Do you really think she can turn bad just from one sentence?

t_ch: 再说了，我一直要求孩子们要堂堂正正、本本分分地做人做事，怎么可能教人作弊嘛！
t_en: Besides, I've always taught the kids to be upright and proper in everything they do. How could I possibly be teaching them to cheat!?

t_ch: 抱歉呐，希儿小姐。作为侦探，我的原则是：怀疑嫌疑人，相信委托人。
t_en: Sorry, Miss Seele. As a detective, my principle is this: doubt the suspect, trust the client.

t_ch: 我已经联系了娜塔莎，见面就能弄清楚了。现在，等着也是等着…不如来打牌吧！
t_en: I've already contacted Natasha, we'll figure it out when we meet. For now, since we're just waiting around... how about a game of cards?
Huh!?

t_ch: 毕竟我们和「四大天王」中的三个都对决过了，你看……
t_en: After all, we've faced off against three of the Formidable Four, so you see...

t_ch: 也对，不和{NICKNAME}对决上一局，简直就像是我混得还不如桑博呢！
t_en: You're right. If I don't have a match with {NICKNAME}, it's like I'm not even as good as Sampo!

t_ch: 好突兀的邀请！
t_en: That's a sudden invitation!

t_ch: 好唐突的好胜心！
t_en: Talk about a sudden competitive streak!

t_ch: 快拿出你的骰子来！你现在要挑战四大天王中最强的一个了！
t_en: Get your dice ready! You're about to challenge the strongest of the Formidable Four!

t_ch: …虽然她三分钟前才知道原来自己是「四大天王」之一。
t_en: ...Even though she only found out three minutes ago that she was one of the Formidable Four.

t_ch: 可以啊，朋友，你这水平够高的。你等我再练一练，下次对决，谁赢谁输可就不好说了。
t_en: Not bad, friend, you've got some serious skills. Just wait till I get some more practice in. Next time we face off, it'll be anyone's game.

t_ch: 荣誉队员，你们果然找到了真犯人！就是你，希儿姐姐你教坏了我！
t_en: Honorary member, you found the true culprit! It was you, Big Sis Seele, you're the one who led me astray!

t_ch: …这里是不是有什么误会？
t_en: ...Is there some kind of misunderstanding here?

t_ch: 面对虎克的指证，你还要解释什么吗？希儿小姐，难道真是你教唆的吗？
t_en: In light of Hook's accusation, what do you have to say for yourself? Miss Seele, were you really the one behind this?

t_ch: 什么就是我教的！虎克，你把话给我说清楚啊！我教你什么了？
t_en: What do you mean I'm behind this!? Hook, you better explain yourself! What exactly did I teach you?

t_ch: 就是你！就是你！
t_en: It's you! It's you!

t_ch: 我没有教你去作弊，或者打压本地帮派吧？你言之凿凿的，搞得我反倒没自信了。
t_en: I never taught you to cheat or bully local gangs, did I? You sound so sure about it that I'm starting to doubt myself.

t_ch: 希儿姐姐，你确实没有教我作弊。但是，关于人生，你教会了我很多。
t_en: Miss Seele, you didn't teach me how to cheat, that's true. But you've taught me a lot about life.

t_ch: 呜呜呜，你忘记了吗？那一天，在贝洛伯格……
t_en: Waaah, did you forget? That day, in Belobog...

t_ch: 老巫婆不给我买棒棒糖，希儿姐姐，我想吃棒棒糖，我要棒棒糖…呜呜呜。
t_en: The old witch won't buy me lollipops... Miss Seele, I want lollipops, I want lollipops... *sniffles*

t_ch: 这一次，我可以给你买。但是下一次呢？
t_en: I can buy them for you, just this once. But what about next time?

t_ch: 你也给我买？
t_en: You'll buy one for Hook again?

t_ch: 那下下次呢，下下下次呢？我不在磐岩镇的话，你又该怎么办呢？
t_en: What about the time after that? And the time after that? What are you gonna do when I'm not in Boulder Town anymore, huh?

t_ch: 你要记住，<color=#dbc291ff>如果你想得到什么东西，就要靠自己争取</color>，我就是这样长大的。
t_en: Remember this: <color=#dbc291ff>If you want something, you've gotta fight for it yourself</color>. That's how I grew up.

t_ch: 可是要怎么做呢?
t_en: But how can I do that?

t_ch: 你个子小、身子灵活，是不是可以帮娜塔莎姐姐清理卫生死角？是不是就拿到零花钱了？
t_en: Since you're small and nimble, how about helping Miss Natasha clean those hard-to-reach spots? Then you can get some pocket money, yeah?

t_ch: 你要充分利用自己的优势，去争取你想要的一切。
t_en: You've gotta make the most of your strengths and fight for everything that you want.

t_ch: 虎克明白了……
t_en: Hook understands now...

t_ch: 如果想得到什么东西…就要利用自己的优势…获得一切……
t_en: If you want something... you gotta use your own strengths... to get everything...

t_ch: …就是这样，呜呜呜。
t_en: And that's what happened... *sob*

t_ch: 原来是这样啊。
t_en: So, this is how it is.

t_ch: 那希儿教得挺好的呀？
t_en: Then Seele actually taught her pretty well.

t_ch: 事情怎么变成了这样？
t_en: How did things end up like this?

t_ch: …对啊，你怎么变成这样的？
t_en: ...Yeah, how'd you end up like this?

t_ch: 我姑且一问，你带领着鼹鼠党远征，在鸽川区横征暴敛，击溃了无数的本地帮派——归根结底，虎克…你到底想要什么？
t_en: Let me ask you something... Leading The Moles on this expedition, terrorizing the Dovebrook District, crushing countless local gangs... At the end of the day, what exactly do you want, Hook?

t_ch: …终于有一位大人来问我，虎克你到底想要什么了。
t_en: ...Finally, a grown-up who asks Hook what she really wants.

t_ch: 我想要的是……
t_en: What I want is...

t_ch: <size=28>天下！</size>
t_en: <size=28>The world!</size>

t_ch: 虎克，看来我们得回旅馆好好聊聊。
t_en: Hook, it seems we need to have a proper talk back at the hotel.

t_ch: 我不走——！我还没得到天下！
t_en: I won't go! I haven't taken over the world yet!

t_ch: 我想要天下，我想要天下，我想要天下，我想要天下，我想要天下，我想要天下！
t_en: I want the whole world, I want the whole world, I want the whole world, I want the whole world, I want the whole world, I want the whole world!

t_ch: 给我天下，我想要天下！给我天下，给我天下，给我天下，给我天下，给我天下！
t_en: Give me the world, I want the world! Give me the world, give me the world, give me the world, give me the world, give me the world!

t_ch: 虎克，你别逼我在全银河最欢愉的星球上让你笑不出来。
t_en: Hook, don't make me wipe that smile off your face on the most elated planet in the cosmos.

t_ch: 虎克再次又哭又闹地被娜塔莎拖走了。
t_en: Hook was dragged away by Natasha again, kicking and screaming.

t_ch: 魔古拉帮引发的骚乱就这样落下了帷幕。
t_en: And so the curtain falls on the chaos caused by the Mogura Gang.

t_ch: 这倒霉孩子，看来真是没少给你们添乱。
t_en: Poor kid, seems like she's been nothing but trouble for you guys.

t_ch: 希儿小姐，你们还要在这里待多久？要不要我带你们去一些本地人才知道的景点？
t_en: Miss Seele, how much longer will you be staying here? Would you like me to show you some local hidden gems?

t_ch: 我们很快就要走了。我们这次是来陪布洛妮娅谈公事的，旅游只能算是附带的。等下次专程来旅游时，我再来找你们一起好好逛逛。
t_en: We'll be leaving soon. We came here to accompany Bronya on her business trip, sightseeing was just a bonus. When I come specifically for leisure next time, I'll hit you up to travel around together.

t_ch: 估计访问团的朋友们都在收拾行李了，我在外面待一会也就回去了。
t_en: Our friends from the delegations are packing their things. I'll be going back shortly.

t_ch: 他们应该会从泊地站坐专列去空港。等下我们去车站送送他们吧。
t_en: They should be taking the express train from Perdido Station to the skyport. Let's head to the station and see them off.

t_ch: 我必须坦率地说：这次会谈如此卓有成效，这都是托了贝洛伯格和平开放的外交态度。
t_en: I must be frank: This meeting has been far more productive than expected, all thanks to Belobog's open and peaceful diplomacy.

t_ch: 毕竟我们双方都希望这个旅游开发项目可以顺利落地。这也多亏了托帕小姐的安排。
t_en: After all, both parties wish to see this tourism development project come to fruition, all thanks to Miss Topaz.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我料想到你会来。你是来给朋友们送行的吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I figured you'd come. Are you here to see your friends off?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！我原本打算来见见你，但这几天实在是太忙了，而且你看起来也非常忙，就没敢联系你。
t_en: {NICKNAME}! I was planning to come see you, but I've been incredibly busy these past few days. You seemed quite occupied as well, so I hesitated to contact you.

t_ch: 下次挑个彼此都相对轻松的时间，我们好好叙叙旧。
t_en: Next time, let's catch up properly when we have the time.

t_ch: 另外几位朋友好像也到车站了。
t_en: Looks like the others have arrived at the station too.

t_ch: 哦，我们到车站了。布洛妮娅和托帕小姐都在等我们呢。
t_en: Oh, we're at the station. Bronya and Miss Topaz are waiting for us.

t_ch: …没想到玉阙仙舟的爻光将军也在这里。
t_en: ...Didn't expected the General Yao Guang of the Xianzhou Yuque to be here.

t_ch: 托帕女士，我也很高兴见到你，不过今日的主角并非你我。
t_en: Miss Topaz, the pleasure is mine, but today, we are not the main attraction.

t_ch: 各位贝洛伯格的使团朋友今日即将踏上返乡之旅，希望这趟二相乐园之旅能给各位留下一个美好印象。
t_en: Dear friends from the Belobog delegation, as you embark on your journey home today, I hope this trip to the Planarcadia has left you with wonderful memories.

t_ch: 我有个提议：何不在这里——二维市最繁华的地方，一起合影留念？
t_en: I have a suggestion: Why don't we take a commemorative photo together here in the busiest part of Duomension City?

t_ch: 这是个好主意。来吧，伙伴们，大家站好队。
t_en: That's a good idea. Come on, everyone, get in line.

t_ch: 你们两个的行李怎么这么沉啊？到底买了多少漫画？
t_en: Why's your luggage so heavy? Just how many comic books did you two buy?

t_ch: 佩拉所有书都要买三本——一本阅读、一本收藏、一本安利，最后就变成这样了。
t_en: Pela bought three copies of every book: one for reading, one for collecting, and one for recommending. That's how it all ended up like this.

t_ch: 对不起，我第一次去那么大的漫画店，有点难以自持了。
t_en: Sorry, it was my first time in such a huge comic book store, I got a little carried away.

t_ch: 我可以协助你们搬运行李。原因：克拉拉并未购置较多商品。
t_en: I can assist with carrying your luggage. Reason: Clara did not purchase an excessive amount of goods.

t_ch: 只买了几个珠星财团的模型，回家好好研究一下。嘿嘿～
t_en: I only bought a few Pearluxe Corp models. I'll study them carefully when I get home. Hehe~

t_ch: 对不起，「青春岁月」，我不该作弊欺负你们牌佬汇的。
t_en: Sorry, Golden Youth, I shouldn't have cheated and bullied you guys from the Cardway.

t_ch: 没关系的，其实和你对决的时候，我也玩得很开心。下次再一起玩骰子吧。
t_en: Don't worry about it! I actually had a lot of fun during our duel. Let's play dice together again sometime.

t_ch: 下次再来对决，也请记得叫上在下。毕竟银河骰法，千变万化！押忍！
t_en: Next time you have a showdown, don't forget to call on yours truly. After all, the way of playing the dice has infinite possibilities in the cosmos! Osu!

t_ch: 不是，你们几个来蹭什么合影？
t_en: Hey, what are you guys doing photobombing here?

t_ch: 我可是四大天王之首，我凭什么不能参加合影？
t_en: I'm the leader of the Formidable Four, why can't I be in the photo?

t_ch: 我在故事里就没露脸，要是结尾连合影也没蹭上，那也太欺负老桑博了吧？
t_en: I didn't even show my face in the story. If I don't get to sneak into the group photo at the end, that's just too cruel to old Sampo, don't you think?

t_ch: 那将军，你又是为什么来蹭合影的呢？
t_en: So General, why are you sneaking into the photo too?

t_ch: 什么叫蹭…我主要怕有些人忘了，所以特地来提醒一下——雅利洛-Ⅵ是仙舟联盟的坚实盟友。如果谁做生意时算计了他们，那就约等于算计了联盟。
t_en: What do you mean "sneaking"... I'm mainly worried some people might've forgotten, so I'm here with a friendly reminder: Jarilo-VI is a steadfast ally of the Xianzhou Alliance. If anyone tries to pull a fast one on them with regard to business matters, it's pretty much the same as crossing the Alliance.

t_ch: 好。大家都静一静，我们要开始拍照了。
t_en: Alright. Everyone settle down, we're about to take a photo.

t_ch: 对了，{NICKNAME}，有空的话，记得回贝洛伯格看看啊，大家都挺想你的。
t_en: Oh right, {NICKNAME}, when you have time, remember to come back and visit Belobog. Everyone really misses you.
Three... two... one...

t_ch: 茄子！
t_en: Cheeeese!

t_ch: 想跟你聊聊。
t_en: I'd like to chat with you.

t_ch: 我想打银河战力党了！
t_en: I want to take on the Cosmicon Collective!

t_ch: 想跟你聊聊。
t_en: I'd like to chat with you.

t_ch: 当然！只要{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}开口，我一定知无不言！
t_en: Of course! Whatever my {F#lady boss}{M#boss} asks, I'll tell you everything I know!

t_ch: 尘灵到底是什么？
t_en: What exactly are wispae?

t_ch: 这可真是个…严肃的问题，就像幻造种们的未解之谜「人类是什么鬼」一样。
t_en: Now that's a... serious question, just like the imagenae's unsolved mystery of "What in the world are humans?"

t_ch: 按照官方说法，每当人类产生一个渺小的愿望，那些不足以幻造的愿力便化作一只只尘灵，散在城市中。
t_en: According to official sources, whenever humans make a small wish, the Wishpower that's too weak for imagenesis transforms into wispae, scattering throughout the city.

t_ch: 我们「牌佬汇」的兄弟们，就有诞生于「我想吃狮子头」、「再睡五分钟」、「要迟到了别啊别啊」…之类愿望的家伙。
t_en: Some of us Cardway members were born from wishes like "I want some meatballs," "Just five more minutes of sleep," and "Oh crud, I'm gonna be late, no no no!"

t_ch: 此外，尘灵的自我意识很弱，几乎感受不到喜怒哀乐。会聚合或是分散成更大更小的个体，也可能随时间自然消散，毕竟…我们本质上只是愿力而已。
t_en: Moreover, wispae have very weak self-awareness and can barely feel emotions. They can merge or split into larger or smaller entities, and may naturally dissipate over time. After all... we're essentially just Wishpower.

t_ch: 也因此，我们被称为二相乐园的「最小单元」，{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}你所看到的一切——都可以被简化为尘灵的聚合。
t_en: That's why we're known as the "smallest unit" in Planarcadia. Everything you see can be simplified to a convergence of wispae, {F#lady boss}{M#boss}.

t_ch: 当然，我「青春岁月」可不是「幻造种•尘灵」那种孱弱的存在。我是二相乐园所有「青春期未竟的愿望」汇聚而成的「青春种•尘灵」。
t_en: Of course, I, "Golden Youth," am not some weak existence like those imagenae wispae. I'm a young wispae, born from all the "unfulfilled wishes of adolescence" that converged in Planarcadia.

t_ch: 啊，又想起当年夕阳下的奔跑，那是我未曾逝去的青春——只要心中常怀挑战精神，青春就是永远不会结束的！
t_en: Ah, I remember running into the sunset back in the day. Those were the days of my youth that never faded. As long as you keep that spirit of challenge in your heart, youth never truly ends!

t_ch: 跟我聊聊你的「牌佬汇」。
t_en: Tell me about your Cardway.

t_ch: 一群热爱「银河战力党」的尘灵，在这二维市为自己建立了一处容身之所，仅此而已。
t_en: A group of wispae who love the Cosmicon Collective built themselves a little hideout in Duomension City. That's all there is to it.

t_ch: 按常理来说，尘灵大都是没有自我意识的。但也许就像我最爱的游戏制作人{RUBY_B#「银河战力党」运营负责人}桑博{RUBY_E#}先生所说的那样——
t_en: As a rule, wispae don't have self-awareness. But maybe, just like my favorite game producer {RUBY_B#Operations Manager for the Cosmicon Collective}Sampo{RUBY_E#} once said...

t_ch: ——「多玩战力党，智力一定涨！」
t_en: ..."Play more Cosmicon Collective, and your IQ will definitely rise!"

t_ch: 不过说到底，这些家伙也只是尘灵罢了，为了约束它们的日常行为，我也为牌佬汇制订了三条严格的规章：
t_en: But at the end of the day, these guys are just wispae, so to keep their day-to-day behavior in check, I've laid down three strict rules for Cardway:

t_ch: 一，热爱二相乐园；二，不许作弊；三、好好学习数学，不然骰子点数都算不明白，还会被外国来的小朋友爆杀。
t_en: One, love Planarcadia. Two, no cheating. Three, study math properly, or you won't even be able to count dice rolls, and you'll get absolutely defeated by kids from abroad.

t_ch: 看起来很简单吧？但光是为了让尘灵们记住这三条规章，我就累得掉直头发。
t_en: Sounds easy, right? But just getting the wispae to remember these three rules has me tearing my hair out.

t_ch: 我其实根本就不是莫西干头，只是发际线退无可退了而已。
t_en: I don't actually have a mohawk. My hairline's just receded as far as it can go.

t_ch: 最近「牌佬汇」怎么样了？
t_en: How's the Cardway doing lately?

t_ch: 战争已经过去了，「魔古拉帮」已经向我展示了他们的牌佬之道。
t_en: The war is over, and the Mogura Gang has shown me their card player spirit.

t_ch: 听说那遥远的雪国之内，「魔古拉帮」帮众甚繁，这次远征也只来了精锐。
t_en: I heard that in that distant, snowy state, the Mogura Gang has a huge following, and only their elites came on this expedition.

t_ch: 「虎•克」…{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}，虎可是帝王之征啊！她智谋过人，我等尘灵恐怕不是她的对手。
t_en: "Hook the Great"... {F#Lady boss}{M#Boss}, that's the name of royalty! She's cunning and brilliant, and we wispae are no match for her.

t_ch: 但一想到未来还有机会和她对决，我的青春之魂就在熊熊燃烧，几乎要把我剩下的这几根头发也烧尽了。
t_en: But just thinking about the chance to face off against her in the future, my youthful soul burns up that it's about to singe off what little hair I have left.

t_ch: 呵，「虎•克」，放马过来吧！
t_en: Heh, "Hook the Great," bring it on!

t_ch: 没事啦，下次再来找你玩。
t_en: No worries, I'll come hang out with you again next time.

t_ch: 是！{NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}，您一路顺利！
t_en: Yes, {NICKNAME}. {F#Lady boss}{M#Boss}, have a safe journey!

t_ch: 没问题，{NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}，我立刻安排！
t_en: No problem, {F#lady boss}{M#boss} {NICKNAME}! I'll arrange it right away!

t_ch: 只是路过，珍重。
t_en: I'm just passing by. Take care.

t_ch: 是！{NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}，您一路顺利！
t_en: Yes, {NICKNAME}. {F#Lady boss}{M#Boss}, have a safe journey!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}，今天也辛苦您了！
t_en: {F#Lady boss}{M#Boss} {NICKNAME}, thanks for your hard work today!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，眼下战事紧急，而我正需要您。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, the war is heating up, and you're exactly the one I need.

t_ch: 为什么首席执行官出现在这里？
t_en: Wait, what's the CEO doing here?

t_ch: …真珠女士本人并不在这里。
t_en: Let's just say the real Madam Pearl is... elsewhere.

t_ch: 这些尘灵之间怎么在互相战斗？
t_en: What's with all these wispae fighting one another?

t_ch: 看来您已经洞察了混乱的本质。
t_en: It looks like you've already figured out what's really behind this chaos.

t_ch: 为了避免误会，请允许我做一下自我介绍——
t_en: Allow me to introduce myself so we're on the same page.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我并非真珠女士本人，</color>而是用以钻研绘世画作的学术型人偶。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I'm not Madam Pearl.</color> I'm an academic puppet built to analyze Graphia's art.

t_ch: 为了方便理解，您可以将我们类比为空间站中众多人偶与黑塔女士之间的关系。
t_en: It's basically the same setup as Madam Herta and her puppets on the space station.

t_ch: 所以…你不是真珠？
t_en: So... you're not Pearl?

t_ch: 真珠女士将部分{RUBY_B#算力}灵智{RUBY_E#}用于「人偶」，是为了处理繁忙公务的同时，有足够时间来钻研二相乐园的艺术——特别是绘世的画作。
t_en: Madam Pearl delegates a slice of her {RUBY_B#Computing Power}consciousness{RUBY_E#} to puppets so she can handle her intense workload and still have time for Planarcadia art, especially the Graphia's artworks.

t_ch: 正如你所见，绘世最著名的画作「覆世沧浪图」出了差错，大量的尘灵涌了出来。
t_en: As you can see, something's gone haywire with Graphia's most renowned masterpiece, Worldbreaker Waves. Wispae are just pouring out of it.

t_ch: 绘世的画作里？
t_en: From a Graphia's artwork?

t_ch: 绘世的画作常被传说和谜团笼罩，「覆世沧浪图」隐藏着惊人的混沌。
t_en: Graphia's work is always full of legends and secrets, but Worldbreaker Waves hides a shocking amount of chaos.

t_ch: 这件事，火花全责！
t_en: Sparxie is totally to blame for this!

t_ch: 不过，那位愚者早已跑得不知踪影，现在再去追责恐怕是有些晚了。
t_en: That Fool has long escaped. It's a little late to be pointing fingers now.

t_ch: 我理解你们是为了解救被困在学校内的人质才使用了画作的力量…不过，我希望您能作为画作事件的亲历者，与我一同平息混乱，修复画作——
t_en: I know you only used the artwork's power to rescue the hostages trapped in the school... But since you're already involved, I hope you'll help me settle this chaos and repair the painting.

t_ch: 换言之，<color=#dbc291ff>我希望您能平定尘灵战乱的局面，统一天下</color>。
t_en: Basically, <color=#dbc291ff>I need you to pacify these warring wispae and unite the world</color>.

t_ch: 主公大人——！军师大人——！敌军包围了我们，现在该如何是好～哇？
t_en: My liege! Great strategist! The enemy is all over us! What should we do now!?

t_ch: 主、主公？
t_en: L-Liege?

t_ch: 这恐怕是指您，{NICKNAME}大人。
t_en: That would be you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 军、军师？
t_en: S-Strategist?

t_ch: 这「军师」一职多半指的是我。
t_en: I assume the "strategist" refers to me.

t_ch: 能给我解释一下吗？
t_en: Can someone explain what's happening?

t_ch: 恐怕眼下没有这样的时间，我们只能在战争中学会战争了！
t_en: There's no time for explanations! We'll have to learn how to fight this war along the way!

t_ch: 敌方统领、军师已在包围阵中！不能让他们跑了，嗬——！
t_en: We've got the enemy general and strategist right where we want 'em! Don't let them escape! Hah!

t_ch: <size=28>格杀勿论！格杀勿论！！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Wipe them out! Leave no survivors!!</size>

t_ch: <size=28>主公大人——！军师大人——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>My liege! Great Strategist!</size>

t_ch: 主公，此番对战，关乎我方兴衰！请快快下命，起兵布阵，敌军要进攻了！
t_en: My liege, the fate of our army is at stake! Give the order to move. The enemy is charging!

t_ch: 尔等鼠辈，安敢犯我疆土！
t_en: You bunch of rats! How dare you set foot on my land!

t_ch: 全军听我指挥！准备迎击！
t_en: All units, listen up! Prepare for battle!
Report!

t_ch: 准报。
t_en: Go ahead.

t_ch: 是给…我说的吗？
t_en: Are you... talking to me?

t_ch: 禀报主公大人，我军旗开得胜！敌军残余已经悉数击退，我军将此地安营扎寨。
t_en: My liege, I bring word of our victory! We have routed the remaining enemies and are setting up camp as we speak.

t_ch: 退下吧。
t_en: I see. You're dismissed.
Yes!

t_ch: 能在短时间内掌握行军布阵的神髓，{NICKNAME}真不愧是我等主公！
t_en: I knew it! To master troop formations so quickly, {NICKNAME} is definitely the liege we've been waiting for!

t_ch: 当然，这也多亏了我们的军师…呃，我应该如何称呼您？
t_en: Of course, we couldn't have done it without our strategist as well. Though, uh... what should we actually call you?

t_ch: 若是继续叫我「真珠」也并不准确…这样吧，为彰显区别，请各位称呼我为真珠•智多星，算是个与军师身份相称的名字，怎么样？
t_en: Actually, it's not quite accurate to continue calling me "Pearl"... To keep things clear, you can call me "Pearl the Wise." It's got that perfect "strategist" ring to it, don't you think?

t_ch: 名字倒无所谓，问题是…
t_en: I don't care about the name. The point is...

t_ch: 两位，速速解释下情况！
t_en: Both of you, hurry and explain what's going on now!

t_ch: 不如…我们让这位能言巧辩的尘灵来解释一番。
t_en: Why don't we... let our eloquent wispae here handle the explanations?

t_ch: 评说乱世风云，道尽古今英雄。欲求天下一统，愿与主公同盟——
t_en: I sing of heroes, past and present, through the changing tides of war. To unite the world under one banner, I offer my humble allegiance to you, my liege!

t_ch: 在下「说书人」诓二，希望能为主公答疑解惑！
t_en: I'm Fibbs the Storyteller. Ask me anything, my liege. I live to serve!

t_ch: 这些尘灵是从哪里来的呢？
t_en: Where exactly did all these wispae come from?

t_ch: 我，以及您身后的士兵们，还有其他尚未收回的尘灵…都来自绘世学院中绘世的名作「覆世沧浪图」——我们是那画作中的古老颜料。
t_en: Me, your loyal soldiers, and every other wispae out there... we're all from Graphia's famous painting, Worldbreaker Waves, over at the Graphia Academy. We're basically the old paint that fell right out of the artwork!

t_ch: 绘世大人的画作遭遇损坏，我等画中尘灵也因此脱落，不知…主公可有头绪？
t_en: Lord Graphia's painting was damaged, and that's why we're all falling out. You wouldn't happen to know anything about that... would you, my liege?

t_ch: 是我干的。
t_en: Yeah, that was my bad.

t_ch: 啊…是主公干的？
t_en: Wait... it was you, my liege?

t_ch: 呜呜呜～那…主、主公干的好哇！呜呜……
t_en: Waaah! I mean... what a brilliant move, my liege! Waaah...

t_ch: 与我无关。
t_en: It has nothing to do with me.

t_ch: 我就知道！
t_en: I knew it!

t_ch: 虽此事与主公无关，但恳请主公为我等出一口恶气！
t_en: Even if you had nothing to do with it, I beg you to help us settle the score, my liege!

t_ch: 为什么它们称呼我为主公呢？
t_en: Why are they calling me "my liege," anyway?

t_ch: 主公可曾听过「烬土纪元」？那是二相乐园最为混乱和残酷的时代——彼时天下大乱，英豪并起…我们正是被用于描绘那「烬土纪元」的笔墨。
t_en: Have you heard of the Cindearth Age, my liege? It was Planarcadia's most brutal and chaotic era, a time of constant war where legendary heroes emerged... We were the very ink used to paint that history.

t_ch: 然而此时此刻，恰如彼时彼刻！
t_en: It's as if history is repeating itself right here and now!

t_ch: 乱世之中，我等弱小的尘灵，只有投奔强大的君主，才是生存之道。
t_en: For weak wispae like us, the only way to survive this chaos is to serve a truly powerful ruler.

t_ch: 现在…这天下是什么情况呢？
t_en: So... what's happening in the world right now?

t_ch: 自从脱离画作之后，尘灵们群龙无首，时而打仗，时而打牌，时而打喷嚏…形成了如今群雄割据的混乱局面！
t_en: Without a leader, the wispae have scattered after leaving the artwork. They spend their time fighting, playing cards, or just sneezing... The world has devolved into a mess of squabbling factions!

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 说人话就是——尘灵分家了，谁也不服谁。
t_en: Basically, the wispae have gone their separate ways and refuse to listen to anyone.

t_ch: 哎！天下大势，分久必合，合久必分…只有主公您才能结束长久的分裂，统一天下！
t_en: They say all great divisions must eventually end in unity. You're the only one who can end this and bring the world together, my liege!

t_ch: 说人话就是——全靠您了。
t_en: Basically, you're their only hope.

t_ch: 这句我能听懂。
t_en: Okay, I understood that part.

t_ch: 来个省流版本吧…
t_en: Can I get a TLDR?

t_ch: 简单来说——身为颜料的尘灵自离开「覆世沧浪图」之后，便掀起了连天战事。
t_en: Long story short: we wispae are essentially living paint, and ever since we left the painting Worldbreaker Waves, we've done nothing but wage war.

t_ch: 它们需要一位君主统一天下，而我则需要一位伙伴收集尘灵、修复画作。
t_en: They need a leader to bring them together, and I need a partner to help me round them up, so we can repair the artwork.

t_ch: 大概明白了…
t_en: Okay, I've got the gist of it...

t_ch: 不过，即便这天下如今仅有一所学校的规模，想要收集尘灵也绝非易事——
t_en: But even if this world is just the size of a school campus, rounding up all these wispae won't be easy.

t_ch: 尘灵们各自拥戴虚构英豪，占据校园的不同据点，又靠「社团活动」稳固了势力。
t_en: Every group of wispae has its own fictional hero. They've taken over different parts of the school and are using "club activities" to fortify their positions.

t_ch: 啊？社团活动？
t_en: Wait, club activities?

t_ch: 社团是绘世学院原本就存在的组织形式，这也算是一种因地制宜的设定。
t_en: Clubs are how things were organized at the Graphia Academy anyway, so it makes sense for the "war" to follow that same logic.

t_ch: 那些英豪们担任着社团领袖——若不是社长，就是社团指导老师。
t_en: These "heroes" are all running things now, usually as the club president or the teacher in charge.

t_ch: 英豪是什么？
t_en: Who are these heroes exactly?

t_ch: 所谓「英豪」多半是融合了烬土历史与某人记忆，共同形成的幻造之躯。而这位不巧闯入绘世画作的「某人」——正是你。
t_en: These "heroes" are basically imagenate constructs, a mix of ancient Cindearth history and someone's memories. And since you're the one who crashed into this artwork, well... they're based on your memories.

t_ch: 这是我必须找*你*来解决此事的另一个原因：英豪们应该都认识你。
t_en: This is exactly why I need your help. Since these heroes are from your head, they're all going to recognize you.

t_ch: 学院云诡谲，天下四分野。据我调查，这四位英豪分别是——
t_en: The Academy is a real battlefield, divided into four main factions. From what I've gathered, the four heroes you'll face are...

t_ch: 「器械体操社的首席」！
t_en: "The Chief of the Prop Gymnastics Club"!

t_ch: 「田径社的独眼龙」！
t_en: "The Lone-Eye Dragon of the Track and Field Club"!

t_ch: 「回家社的猎刀人」！
t_en: "The Bladehunter of the Go-Home Club"!

t_ch: 「真理社的泡澡人」！
t_en: "The Bather of the Truth Society"!

t_ch: 想必那都是你熟识的面孔。不过，还请您记住，那都是受「幻造技艺」影响，从你的记忆中提取的虚构形象、并非本人。
t_en: They must all be familiar to you. But don't forget, they're just fictional versions of people you know, created by imagenesis using your memories. They're not the real deal.

t_ch: 我脑子里好像能对上都是谁了。
t_en: Yeah, I think I can put a name to all of them.

t_ch: 你对你的朋友们很了解，这对战术策略很有帮助。
t_en: You know your friends well, which will give us a major tactical advantage.

t_ch: 二相乐园的设定有点太方便了…
t_en: The rules of Planarcadia certainly make things too convenient...

t_ch: 我常听人说起——「幻造」总是有着无限的可能性。
t_en: People always say that "imagenesis" is full of endless possibilities.

t_ch: 各种真真假假的情报，如果你实在难以消化，不去理解也无妨。
t_en: There's a lot of conflicting info to digest. If it's too much, it's fine not to understand it.

t_ch: ——重要的是，主公您要懂得如何运筹帷幄，率兵取胜！
t_en: The only thing that really matters is that you're the one calling the shots and leading us to victory!

t_ch: 士兵们已经在此地筑造好了大本营。一场大战刚刚结束，此时我们不妨回营整备军事，为下一场战事做好准备。
t_en: The troops have finished setting up our base camp. Now that the first fight is over, let's head back to rest up and get ready for the next campaign.

t_ch: 古人所谓「名不正则言不顺，言不顺则事不成」。主公，我军还需要一个「名头」，用来征讨四方枭雄！
t_en: As the saying goes, "without a proper name, one's words carry no weight, and when words hold no weight, success cannot be attained." My liege, we need a name for our army if we're going to take over this campus!

t_ch: 兵贵一心，师出有名。既然四位英豪的势力皆是社团，我们也应组建一个社团，主公有想法了吗？
t_en: Soldiers fight best for a cause they believe in. Since our rivals have all formed clubs, we should do the same. Any thoughts on a name, my liege?

t_ch: 幻造美术社。
t_en: Imagenasis Art Club.

t_ch: 不错，很正统的名字，毕竟我们的目的就是修复绘世的画作。
t_en: Sounds professional. It makes sense, considering we're here to fix Graphia's painting.

t_ch: 传令下去，就这么决定了！
t_en: Send word to the troops. That's the name we're going with!

t_ch: 让我再想想…
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 没事，我们可以慢慢考虑。
t_en: No worries, take your time to think it over.

t_ch: 狸狸通信杂志社。
t_en: Furbobocom Magazine Club.

t_ch: 恕我直言，主公，鸽川区似乎已有被如此称呼的注册企业…啊，这是主公的企业呀，那就没事了。
t_en: Forgive me, my liege, but I believe there's already a company with that name in Dovebrook District... Oh, wait, that's your company. Never mind then!

t_ch: 你真的要叫这个名字吗？
t_en: Are you sure that's the name you want to go with?

t_ch: 传令下去，就这么决定了！
t_en: Send word to the troops. That's the name we're going with!

t_ch: 让我再想想…
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 没事，我们可以慢慢考虑。
t_en: No worries, take your time to think it over.

t_ch: 你又是什么货社。
t_en: What's-Your-Deal Club.

t_ch: 什么意思啊？
t_en: What does that mean?

t_ch: 这是在交易过程中询问对方商品名的社团…我编不下去了，你真的要叫这个名字吗？
t_en: It's a club for... checking out what products others are dealing? I can't even think of a good excuse for this one. Are you really going with this name?

t_ch: 传令下去，就这么决定了！
t_en: Send word to the troops. That's the name we're going with!

t_ch: 让我再想想…
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 没事，我们可以慢慢考虑。
t_en: No worries, take your time to think it over.

t_ch: 不可以摄社。
t_en: No-Snapping Club.

t_ch: …这又是什么意思呢？
t_en: And what is that supposed to mean?

t_ch: 这是阻止盗摄的正义社团…我编不下去了，你真的要叫这个名字吗？
t_en: It's like a group for "justice" that stops people from taking creepshots? I can't even think of a good excuse for this one. Are you really going with this name?

t_ch: 传令下去，就这么决定了！
t_en: Send word to the troops. That's the name we're going with!

t_ch: 让我再想想…
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 没事，我们可以慢慢考虑。
t_en: No worries, take your time to think it over.

t_ch: 施饿社。
t_en: Feed-the-Hungry Club.
...Huh?

t_ch: 或许是说…这是个慈善性质的社团，你真的要叫这个名字吗？
t_en: I guess it sounds... charitable? Are you really going with this name?

t_ch: 传令下去，就这么决定了！
t_en: Send word to the troops. That's the name we're going with!

t_ch: 让我再想想…
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 没事，我们可以慢慢考虑。
t_en: No worries, take your time to think it over.

t_ch: <size=28>{TEXTJOIN#255}！{TEXTJOIN#255}！</size>
t_en: <size=28>{TEXTJOIN#255}! {TEXTJOIN#255}!</size>

t_ch: 恭喜主公可以称霸了！
t_en: Congratulations, my liege! You're well on your way to dominating the world!

t_ch: 出征前，我建议您检阅一下咱们{TEXTJOIN#255}的军队！
t_en: Before we head out, you should probably take a look at our forces in {TEXTJOIN#255}!
